project_info.name: Network Threat Watch
project_info.description: A comprehensive cybersecurity platform for threat detection, analysis, and response. The application provides real-time security monitoring, URL and email analysis, network traffic inspection, threat intelligence lookup, and automated incident response capabilities.
project_info.target_audience: Cybersecurity professionals, IT administrators, security analysts, and organizations requiring advanced threat detection and response capabilities

core_features.name: User Authentication & Authorization
core_features.description: Secure user authentication system with session management and protected routes

core_features.name: Security Dashboard
core_features.description: Centralized security overview with real-time threat monitoring and system health
requirements: Refresh functionality for live data updates

core_features.name: URL Threat Analysis
core_features.description: Comprehensive URL scanning and reputation analysis for malware and phishing detection
requirements: Integration with multiple threat intelligence sources
Threat score calculation and verdict classification
Detailed analysis results with domain reputation

core_features.name: Email Security Analysis
core_features.description: Email header and content analysis for phishing and spoofing detection
requirements: SPF, DKIM, and DMARC authentication verification

core_features.name: Network Traffic Analysis
core_features.description: Network packet analysis and anomaly detection with visualization
requirements: Port scan and DDoS pattern detection

core_features.name: Threat Intelligence Lookup
core_features.description: Multi-source threat intelligence aggregation and indicator lookup
requirements: Support for multiple indicator types (IP, domain, URL, hash)

core_features.name: File Malware Analysis
core_features.description: File upload and malware scanning capabilities

core_features.name: OSINT and Reconnaissance
core_features.description: Open source intelligence gathering and reconnaissance tools

core_features.name: Threat Alert Management
core_features.description: Centralized threat alert system with severity classification and notifications
requirements: Severity level classification (low, medium, high, critical)

core_features.name: Security Analytics & Reporting
core_features.description: Comprehensive analytics dashboard with trend analysis and reporting

core_features.name: Automated Incident Response
core_features.description: Automated threat response and mitigation system

core_features.name: System Configuration
core_features.description: Application settings and user preference management

user_flows.name: New User Onboarding
user_flows.description: Complete user registration and initial setup process

user_flows.name: Threat Analysis Workflow
user_flows.description: End-to-end threat analysis from detection to response
steps: Threat indicator input (URL, email, file, network data)

security.data_encryption: AES-256 in transit and at rest

integration_requirements.name: FastAPI Backend
integration_requirements.purpose: Core threat analysis and data processing

quality_requirements.scalability: Horizontal scaling support for increased load
quality_requirements.usability: Intuitive interface with minimal learning curve
quality_requirements.security: Enterprise-grade security with regular vulnerability assessments
